validation.f_number_counts_match: passed: English and Chinese each have 79 F-markers and 27 unique F-numbers

unresolved_issues: Long OCR equations, especially paper equation (3.17) and compact matrix equations (5.3)-(5.5), need source-level PDF review.
The Rep-MMB implementation is a simpler Woodford-style model with two shocks and no monetary-policy shock innovation.
Paper and implementation use different parameter scaling for beta and sigma; this is recorded as implementation_cross_check rather than normalized.
No runtime validation, residual check, BK check, or IRF check was performed.
